title: Assessing the Reliability of LLM Annotations in the Context of Demographic Bias and Model Explanation
description: Code and analysis comparing human annotators of varied demographics against demographically persona-prompted LLMs, using SHAP to attribute label decisions to specific text spans. Archived snapshot for the v1.0-thesis release accompanying the doctoral thesis Let Me Explain! Explainable NLP for Understanding Large Language Models (Utrecht University, 2026).
